title: Winter Olympics latest
description: World’s harshest climates Friends buried by an avalanche ‘The eighth continent of Earth’ Ancient bacteria strain Willie Colón dies at 75 Roman Baluk/Reuters Deadly explosions in western Ukraine investigated as ‘terrorist attack’ Ukraine’s President Zelensky has survived against all odds. How long can his luck hold? Here’s what other consequences he could face CNN Mattia Ozbot/Getty Images Canada takes gold in thrilling men’s curling final while USA takes bronze in 2-women bobsled Douglas Ball/AP Team USA is one game away from its first gold medal in men’s hockey since the ‘Miracle on Ice.’ That team still inspires Feb 21, 2026 Ad Feedback Weekend reads Chung Sung-Jun/Getty Images The week a president got a life sentence for trying to unravel democracy NASA/JPL/USGS Big mysteries remain about the moon.
